text:
Payment of periodical payments by standing order

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall make payment of the sums due under paragraph [para number] [and paragraph [para number]] above by standing order into the [applicant’s] / [respondent’s] following account:

Name of Bank/Building Society:	[name of bank]

Sort Code: 				[sort code]

Account Number:			[account number]

Name of account holder: 		[name of account holder]

or such other account as the [applicant] / [respondent] may from time to time nominate in writing.

Permission to disclose order to CMS

There be permission under FPR 2010 r 12.73(1)(b) to produce a copy of this order to the CMS.

Variation: periodical payments

Paragraph [para number] of the order in this matter dated [date] shall be varied to provide that the [applicant] / [respondent] shall pay to the [respondent] / [applicant] periodical payments for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family. Payments shall be at the rate of £[amount] [per child] per annum, payable [weekly] / [monthly] [in advance] / [in arrears] by standing order. Payments shall start on [date], and shall end on (i) each child respectively attaining the age of 18 years or ceasing [his] / [her] / [their] full-time [secondary] / [tertiary] education [to first degree level] [[including] / [excluding] a gap year], whichever shall be the later, or (ii) a further order. [(For avoidance of doubt, where the relevant child takes a pre-tertiary education gap year, delaying the commencement of tertiary education by one year, the child periodical payments shall be suspended for that year and shall automatically revive when the child commences tertiary education.)]

[The [applicant] / [respondent] shall be released from [his] / [her] undertaking to [insert] in paragraph [para number] of the order in this matter dated [date].]

[The arrears under paragraph [para number] of the order in this matter dated [date] accrued to [date] shall be remitted.]

Capital provision for housing
